===={{aniseries|JN}}====
[[File:Clemont JN.png|thumb|250px|left|Clemont in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
Clemont reappeared in ''[[JN103|The Future is Now, Thanks to Strategy!]]'', where he was seen defeating a challenger before reuniting with Ash, who introduced him to his current Pokémon team. When [[Ash's Sirfetch'd]] started to learn a new move, Clemont identified the move as {{m|Meteor Assault}} and used his newest Clemontic Gear to determine why Sirfetch'd was having trouble mastering the move. With Clemont's advice and some inadvertent help from [[Ash's Dracovish]], the move was perfected. Clemont then suggested a [[Double Battle]] to put the new move to the test, which Ash agreed on. The battle quickly ended in Ash's victory.

In ''[[JN104|Taking Two For The Team!]]'', Clemont joined [[Goh]] and Bonnie in observing Ash's [[World Coronation Series]] match against [[Drasna]]. During the battle, Bonnie revealed that Clemont had also battled Drasna once and lost, although Clemont didn't like being reminded of that.

In ''[[JN131|Paring Pokémon While Parrying!]]'', Clemont and Bonnie were seen watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}}. In the [[JN132|next episode]], they watched in apprehension as Pikachu reached his limit during the climax of the battle.
{{-}}
